Free for Triangle nonprofits · Agent Skills

Triangle Builder Kit

A free, growing kit of AI building blocks for NC Research Triangle nonprofits. First release — audit-ready impact reporting, regional funder intelligence, and bilingual EN/ES appeals.
impact-report-builder
CSRD/ESG · GRI/SASB/SDOH · every figure source-traced
triangle-funder-intel
Regional, sourced funder prospecting — never fabricated
bilingual-appeal-engine
EN ⇄ ES cultural transcreation with parity QA
kit.isonew.digital ZERO FABRICATION  ·  Apache-2.0
